summary: Verified header logo replacement on Navbar. New VFX (1tz9gzuc_ripplelogohovfx.png.png) and Digital (h5koig8q_ripplelogohodigital.png.png) logos load with 200 status, render at exactly 100px height with w-auto aspect ratio (natural 1134x302), and switch correctly via the department toggle. Footer still uses the old vertical logo (kzqbmomq_ripplelogodigital.png) - unchanged as required. Logo click scrolls to #hero. Responsive verified at 1920px, 768px, and 390px viewports - height stays 100px in all cases.
passed: VFX header logo uses new ripplelogohovfx URL and loads (naturalWidth=1134, complete=true)
Digital header logo uses new ripplelogohodigital URL and loads (naturalWidth=1134, complete=true)
Header logo renders at 100px height with h-[100px] w-auto classes
Department switcher toggles between VFX and Digital header logos
No 404 errors on either header logo asset
Footer logo unchanged (still uses kzqbmomq_ripplelogodigital.png vertical logo)
